extraction.one_line_summary: MOLLEMA Bauke attacked solo on penultimate climb when favorites watched each other, held 30+ seconds through final climb to win by 16 seconds
tactical_patterns: MOLLEMA exploited pace lull on penultimate climb when favorites marked each other; 100% commitment immediately established decisive 30-second gap.
CICCONE early selection attack on Sormano drew strong group but regrouped on descent, revealing Monument attacks require final-climb positioning.
INEOS controlled early with BERNAL fresh from Piemonte win but failed to chase MOLLEMA, suggesting Monument favorites hesitate against non-GC threats.

rider_signals.MOLLEMA Bauke: positive: recognized tactical stalemate among favorites to launch winning move on penultimate climb, not traditional finale climb
rider_signals.BERNAL Egan: negative: INEOS-backed favorite fresh from Piemonte win failed to respond decisively to MOLLEMA's penultimate climb attack
rider_signals.NIBALI Vincenzo: negative: dropped on penultimate climb, former winner showing clear form decline unable to contest Monument
rider_signals.VALVERDE Alejandro: positive: alert bridging to early CICCONE selection and sprinted to second despite 38 years old
rider_signals.FUGLSANG Jakob: positive: fourth place caps incredible season, consistently present in key selections without Monument-winning punch
